text.title: Agency Discovery Call Scorecard Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the `rubric` artefact this methodology produces. Validator at scripts/validate-agency-discovery-call-scorecard.py enforces the contract.

section.title: Schema

example.note: axes empty (need >=3), missing score_range, decision_threshold, owner.

section.title: Forbidden patterns
section.pattern: Artefact MUST NOT omit `owner` — orphan artefacts violate rule `named-owner`.
Artefact MUST NOT include keys outside the schema — `additionalProperties: false` is binding.
Artefact MUST NOT contain forbidden placeholder tokens in any string value (validator rejects them).
